library.name: smalot/pdfparser
library.description: Pure-PHP PDF text extractor. Used by \local_aigrader\extractor\pdf_extractor to read student PDF submissions without requiring a system-level pdftotext binary.

library.name: symfony/polyfill-mbstring
library.description: Polyfill that provides the mb_* string functions on PHP installs without the mbstring extension. Transitive dependency of smalot/pdfparser; effectively a no-op on Moodle hosts that already ship mbstring.

library.name: composer/autoload-bootstrap
library.description: Composer-generated autoloader bootstrap (ClassLoader, InstalledVersions, autoload_*.php) shipped under thirdparty/vendor/. Generated, not authored — declared here so the Moodle code/phpdoc checkers skip it.

library.name: composer/autoload-entrypoint
library.description: Composer-generated autoloader entry point. Required so PHP can locate smalot/pdfparser at runtime via thirdparty/vendor/autoload.php. Single file at the vendor/ root, sibling to the composer/ subdirectory.
